name: mirage-lsp-client
description: Diagnostics, go-to-definition, and hover for Mirage (.mir) files via mirage-lsp.

mirage.lspPath.description: Path to the mirage-lsp executable. Defaults to searching PATH.

mirage.libraryPath.description: Value for the MIRAGE_PATH environment variable passed to mirage-lsp, used to resolve standard-library imports (e.g. "std/..."). Leave empty to inherit MIRAGE_PATH from VS Code's own environment - VS Code launched from a desktop/app-menu shortcut often does not have shell-rc-exported variables like MIRAGE_PATH set, so if standard-library imports fail to resolve only in the editor (but work from a terminal), set this explicitly.
